summary.zh: 为移动、缩放、循环和视差提供等价的低动态表达。
summary.en: Provide equivalent low-motion treatments for travel, scaling, loops, and parallax.

definition.zh: 尊重用户的 prefers-reduced-motion 设置，降低或移除动态效果。
definition.en: Reduced-motion behavior honors the user preference with stable spatial states and concise essential feedback.

purpose.zh: 为移动、缩放、循环、视差和物理动效提供信息等价的低动态表达。
purpose.en: Provide information-equivalent low-motion treatments for travel, scaling, loops, parallax, and physical motion.

frequency.zh: 每个动效模式都需评审，持续运动和大幅空间移动优先处理。
frequency.en: Review every motion pattern, prioritizing continuous motion and large spatial travel.

trigger.zh: 由 prefers-reduced-motion 与产品内显式设置共同决定，并实时响应变化。
trigger.en: Resolve from prefers-reduced-motion plus an explicit product setting, responding to changes live.

enterExit.zh: 内容立即进入稳定位置，使用静态层级、颜色、文本或极短淡入表达状态。
enterExit.en: Place content at its stable position immediately and express state through static hierarchy, color, text, or a very short fade.

interruptibility.zh: 偏好切换时终止当前非必要动画并应用最终状态，保留任务进度。
interruptibility.en: When preference changes, stop nonessential motion at its final state while preserving task progress.

gestureRules.zh: 手势功能继续可用，取消动量、回弹和自动跟随；键盘与按钮路径完整保留。
gestureRules.en: Keep gesture functions available while removing momentum, bounce, and automatic following, with full keyboard and button paths.

reducedMotion.zh: 形成逐模式策略：位移归零、缩放固定、循环停止、视差冻结、进度改用静态反馈。
reducedMotion.en: Define per-pattern treatment: zero travel, fixed scale, stopped loops, frozen parallax, and static progress feedback.

reviewNotes.zh: 分别审核 reduced motion 与硬件加速，两者关注点独立。
reviewNotes.en: Review reduced motion and hardware acceleration separately because they address different concerns.

reviewNotes.zh: 在操作系统偏好和产品设置的所有组合下测试。
reviewNotes.en: Test every combination of operating-system preference and product setting.
